title: Lizzy | Ninja Toy Sword with Scabbard | 53cm, Black, Reusable Plastic | Lightweight, Safe for Kids, Assorted Colours | Costume Accessory for Ninja Roleplay
features: Costume Adventure Ready; features a reusable plastic ninja sword with scabbard; ideal for kids’ roleplay at parties or World Book Day; easy for unisex children to wield in imaginative games; choose for creative dress-up fun;

Safe Play Confidence; crafted from lightweight plastic with smooth edges; designed for children’s indoor and outdoor action; suitable for parents seeking worry-free ninja games; ensures hours of energetic entertainment;
Realistic Draw and Sheathe; includes matching scabbard for authentic samurai or ninja experience; lets kids mimic their heroes during themed events; enhances any costume ensemble;

Surprise Colour Excitement; available in assorted colours for added variety; each sword brings a new twist to playtime; great for party bags or group activities where every child gets a unique accessory;

Compact and Portable; measures approximately 53cm for easy handling and storage; fits comfortably in small hands and backpacks; suitable for on-the-go fun at parks, school events, or family gatherings;
